name: Turkish Get-Up (TGU)
setup: Lie on floor, kettlebell in right hand pressed overhead
Right arm locked out, kettlebell directly over shoulder
Left arm out to side for balance
execution: Roll to left elbow, keeping arm locked overhead
Push up to left hand, arm still locked
Sweep right leg under, come to one knee
Stand up to lunge position, then straighten
cues: Eyes follow the kettlebell at all times
Each position is a pause — never rush
